title: Bug: admin election uses historical first_seen not session order
description: DirectoryList online list is ordered by store.all_users() which queries ORDER BY first_seen ASC. first_seen is historical (set once, never updated). If Alice connected in a previous session before Bob, she appears as online[0] (admin) even if Bob has been online continuously in the current session and Alice just connected. Both clients think they're admin. Both call create_group(). MLS epoch collision — messages are undeliverable.\n\nFix: add a monotonic connection_counter to AppState. store.connect() assigns each client a sequence number. ws.rs sorts the online slice of DirectoryList by sequence number ascending before sending it. The first-connected-this-session client (lowest seq) is always admin.
close_reason: added connection_counter AtomicU64 to AppState; connect() assigns monotonic seq; ws.rs sorts online slice by seq before sending DirectoryList; admin is always the first-connected client in the current session, not historical first_seen
